budgetCategories.label: Environment & Streets
budgetCategories.description: Waste collection and recycling, street cleaning, environmental health, and regulatory services.

budgetCategories.label: Planning & Development
budgetCategories.description: Planning applications, building control, economic development, and regeneration projects.

budgetCategories.label: Council Running Costs
budgetCategories.description: Council tax collection, HR, finance, IT, legal services, and democratic governance.

budgetCategories.label: Culture & Leisure
budgetCategories.description: Libraries, museums, parks, leisure centres, sports facilities, and arts programmes.

budgetCategories.label: Housing
budgetCategories.description: Housing benefit, homelessness services, council housing management, and affordable housing programmes.

budgetCategories.label: Roads & Transport
budgetCategories.description: Road maintenance, public transport subsidies, street lighting, and transport planning.

feedItems.description: allocated £8.2m to Environment & Streets (≈£164 per household)
allocated £3.6m to Council Running Costs (≈£73 per household)
allocated £4.5m to Planning & Development (≈£89 per household)
allocated £2.5m to Culture & Leisure (≈£49 per household)
raised Band D council tax by £72 (3.4%) to £2187
